narrative:
Sugarcreek 156 (precinct in Greene County) has 2,026 registered voters, with 48.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.8 percentage points.
